name: sensorQueueMisoData
title: sensorQueueMisoData
syntax: SensorErrorCode sensorQueueMisoData(char[] sysVarNamespace, byte buffer[], dword bitCount);
description: This function is intended to be used for SPI slave simulation in basic mode. It inserts the given MISO data into the response queue of the given slave.

parameters.name: sysVarNamespace
parameters.description: The namespace of the slave the data shall be queued in.
